fix_diff: Added _strip_modstore_deploy_prefix() and use deploy-relative paths for overlay placement and related-test inference. Added regression for monorepo root + MODstore_deploy/modstore_server path that must run smoke pytest. Extended loop_memory_requires_executable_change() to require executable changes after await_human_strategy_approval review/QA risks and recent human-strategy runs. Added ops_staged_auto_approve regression that marker-only self_maintenance_loop_status.py is rejected under review_or_qa_reported_risk memory.
root_cause: Path handling used raw rel_path for overlay/test inference, so monorepo-root inputs with MODstore_deploy/ prefixes bypassed modstore_server smoke fallback or double-prefixed overlay paths. loop_memory_requires_executable_change only considered stop/open_items, not await_human_strategy_approval/recent completed_waiting_human_strategy states.
symptom: Self-maintenance loop still fails after target-branch prompt fix: narrow CI loses smoke fallback for prefixed MODstore_deploy paths and marker-only gate does not fail closed for recent review/QA risk memory.
